mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, name, phone, email, avatar, role, status, permissions, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM admin WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, name, phone, email, avatar, role, status, permissions, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM admin WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, name, phone, email, avatar, role, status, permissions, create_time as createdAt, update_time as updateTime FROM admin ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin (username, password, name, phone, email, avatar, role, status, permissions) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{status}, #{permissions})
